_comment: Wave start offsets for an Ironman 70.3 race. Each value is the number of seconds after the official gun that wave started. Division names must exactly match the 'Division' column in the results CSV (check with: grep -o '"[^"]*"' file.csv | sort -u).
_how_to_find: Ironman publishes wave schedules in the athlete guide (ironman.com → race page → athlete guide). Convert clock times to seconds-from-gun. E.g. if gun = 6:45:00 and M30-34 starts at 6:58:00, offset = 780.
